name: Kohl's Caramel Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oleo, syrup, sugar, and salt in a microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave on high until the mixture comes to a full boil.
3. Remove the bowl from the microwave and quickly stir in baking soda.
4. Spread the popped corn in a paper bag that has been rolled down at the top.
5. Pour 1/3 of the syrup mixture into the bag of popcorn and shake the bag very hard.
6. Repeat step 5 twice, always shaking the bag very hard each time.
7. Unroll the bag and close it securely.
8. Shake the bag very hard again.
9. Microwave for an additional 1½ minutes. Remove from microwave and shake the bag very hard.
10. Return the bag to the microwave for another minute and shake the bag very hard once more.
11. Pour the popcorn onto a cookie sheet and allow it to cool.
12. Store in a large container.
This recipe is taken from:
IT NEVER TURNS OUT THE SAME WAY COOKBOOK
A Collection of Recipes from the Kitchen of Joyce & Clem Kohl.
